recipes.name: Beef Tacos
recipes.description: Quick weeknight tacos with seasoned ground beef
directions: Brown ground beef in a large skillet over medium-high heat, breaking it up as it cooks
Drain excess fat from the pan
Season with cumin, chili powder, garlic powder, salt, and pepper; stir to combine
Warm tortillas in a dry skillet or directly over a gas flame for 30 seconds per side
Assemble tacos with beef, cheese, sour cream, and salsa

recipes.name: Spaghetti Carbonara
recipes.description: Classic Roman pasta — creamy without any cream
ingredients: 4 oz pancetta or thick-cut bacon, diced
directions: Bring a large pot of heavily salted water to a boil; cook spaghetti until al dente, reserving 1 cup of pasta water before draining
Cook pancetta in a large skillet over medium heat until crispy; add garlic and cook 1 minute, then discard garlic
Whisk eggs and Parmesan together in a bowl until smooth
Remove skillet from heat and add drained pasta; toss to coat in the rendered fat
Pour egg mixture over pasta and toss vigorously, adding pasta water a splash at a time until sauce is creamy and clings to the noodles
Season aggressively with black pepper and serve immediately

recipes.name: Banana Bread
recipes.description: Moist and dense banana bread — best with very ripe bananas
directions: Preheat oven to 350°F; grease a 9x5 loaf pan
Mash bananas thoroughly in a large mixing bowl
Stir in melted butter until combined
Mix in sugar, beaten egg, and vanilla
Sprinkle baking soda and salt over the mixture and stir in
Fold in flour until just combined — do not overmix
Pour batter into the prepared loaf pan
Bake 55–65 minutes until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean
Cool in the pan for 10 minutes, then turn out onto a rack before slicing
